title: IAMMAI Governance Action
description: First bounded schema for governance action records that preserve attributable, legitimacy-bounded, matter-scoped lawful force without becoming semantic source, witness, or validation.

governance_action_id.description: Stable identifier for the governance action record.

authority_class.description: Bounded authority class under which the action was treated as lawful.

actor_ref.description: Reference to the actor that performed or authorized the governance action.

legitimacy_basis_ref.description: Reference to the lawful basis under which the governance action counted.

matter_ref.description: Reference to the bounded matter to which the governance action applies.

acted_at.description: Time at which the governance action occurred.

delegated_from_ref.description: Optional reference to the delegating source where the action was performed under delegation.

target_state_ref.description: Optional reference to the target state affected by the governance action.

target_transition_ref.description: Optional reference to the target transition affected by the governance action.

related_validation_ref.description: Optional reference to a related validation artifact.

related_witness_ref.description: Optional reference to a related witness artifact.

contribution_role_map_ref.description: Optional reference to a related contribution-role mapping artifact.

notes_ref.description: Optional reference to bounded supporting notes or related supporting material.
